prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were calculated for phenol using **DFT** with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (density-fitting on) within the gas phase. The calculation treated phenol with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 as default. The geometry was provided as /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz and was not re-optimized for this analysis.

The most electrophilic site was identified as **C atom 3** with a Fukui-plus index (f⁺) of **2.1028319**. The swelling positivity of f⁺ potentially traces relaxed local density contributions. No solvent impacts rely hierarchical approximations to unseen relaxed (+. Optionalizations).

Warnings issued concern Fukui summariesn/km alignment omphelihood conservationality funcs describe trace local rests.
